summary: node-fsagent ships archive-sender.js that collects host data and posts it to a remote endpoint
details: The package contains archive-sender.js which imports child_process, fs, and https, reads host identity data including os.hostname() and filesystem contents, and issues https.request() calls to a remote endpoint. The combination of host reconnaissance, filesystem access, and outbound HTTPS from a package whose name suggests a benign filesystem helper is consistent with installer-side data collection and exfiltration rather than a documented library function. The package name resembles legitimate filesystem tooling but the shipped code performs network transmission of host and filesystem state.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
